titleStmt.title: SII 31.200: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 200. (A.R. No. B 304 of 1937.) BHAṬṬIPRŌLU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the proper right pillar of the mukhamaṇḍapa of the Viṭṭhalēśvara temple.
It is dated in the Śaka 1460, Hēmaḷaṁbi, Phālguṇa, ba. 10 corresponding to Sunday, February, 24, 1538 A.D. (current).

The first face of the record states that Vuppalapāṭi Timmanāyuḍu renewed the gift of a land of 1 kha measured with the specific measuring rod called kēsaripāṭi which was originally granted by Vishṇuvaradhana chakravarti, for maintaining the perpetual lamp in the temple of Viṭṭhalēśvara at Bhaṭṭiprōlu.

The second face refers to the re-construction of maṇḍapa to the temple of Śrī Viṭṭhalēśvara mahādēva in the cyclic year chitrabhānu. The third face, written in a Āṭavēladi meter, refers, to the worship to the God.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīsvasti . samasta śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1
460 nagunēṭi hēmaḷaṁbi saṁvatsara phāllu
ṇa ba 10 Ā . śrīviṭhalēśvara mahādēvaraku pū
rvvāna viṣṇuvarddhana cakravarttisāgiṁcci
na kṣētramu kēsaripāṭini kha 1 dēvu
ni nityanaivēdyānakunnu nityadīpā
rādhanakunnu vuppalapāṭi timmā
nāyiṁḍu pūrvaṁ sāgiṁccenu .

śrīviṭhalēśvara mahādēvara guḍimaṁḍḍa
pamunu citrabhānu saṁvatyaramunanu
vuppalapāṭi timminēniṁgāru puna
rōthārakamugānu kaṭiṁcenu . śrī

vālāyamu nāvala gunanu veṁccaṁga
dagune bālā damanuḍu saruguna bu
vvula neṁcine gurigā yōgi janamuni
sēvitā bhaṭṭiprōli bhōgēśvara liṁggapuṇya taraṁgga .
mēdi dātanna miṁccina vuppala
pāṭi koṁḍḍayya timmapabhuvraruni kōṭēśvaruṁ jē
śi jaṁdra jaḍabhōgēśvara liṁgga suguṇa
vurā
Digital edition of SII 31.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
